title: JLM
description: JoinLeaveMessages is a plug—in for Paper that allows you to customize player entry and exit messages with support for color codes and name substitution. Enables the command to update the configuration without restarting the server.
body:
JoinLeaveMessages is a lightweight and user—friendly plugin that allows you to set up personalized messages when players log in and out on the server. You can use it to add more atmosphere, welcome new players, or simply decorate the chat with beautiful colored notifications.

---------------

✨ Capabilities:

✔ Custom greetings and goodbyes – set your own unique messages for players to enter and exit.

✔ Color code support – Use ```&``` to change text color.

✔ Dynamic nickname substitution – ```%player%``` is replaced with the player's name.

✔ Flexible configuration via ```config.yml``` – easily edit messages without changing the code.
 The ```/ljmreload``` command is an instant reboot of the configuration without the need to restart the server.

-------------------

⚙ How to Install?

1️⃣ Download ```JoinLeaveMessages.jar```.

2️⃣ Move the file to the ```plugins/``` folder.

3️⃣ Start the server to generate the ```config.yml``` file.

4️⃣ Edit ```plugins/JoinLeaveMessages/config.yml```:


```
join_message: "&aWelcome, %player%!"
quit_message: "&c%player% has left the server."
```
5️⃣ Use ```/ljmreload``` in-game or in the console to apply changes.

----------------

| Command           | 	Description            | Permission             |
|---------------------|:---------------------:|---------------------:|
| ```/ljmreload```           | Reloads the plugin configuration             | 	```ljm.reload```   

--------

📥 Download, customize, and create a welcoming atmosphere on your server with JoinLeaveMessages! 🎉
